import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useHospital } from '../hooks/useHospital'; import { useAuth } from '../../auth/hooks/useAuth'; import { Activity, ShieldPlus, HeartPulse, ShieldCheck, Mail, Phone, User, Lock, Building2, MapPin, Clock, Tag, Globe, Map } from 'lucide-react'; import { useSelector } from 'react-redux'; const CreateHospital = () => { const { handleCreateHospital ,handleGetHospitalAdmin } = useHospital(); const { handleGetCurrentUser } = useAuth(); const {hospitalAdmin} = useSelector((state) => state.hospital) const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ hospitalName: '', openingTime: '', closingTime: '', address: '', city: '', state: '', country: '', pincode: '', contactNumber: '', email: '', type: '', speciality: '' }); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Usually submit the combined data, but admin data can just be picked up by backend directly. handleCreateHospital(formData); }; return (
{/* Left Pane - 3D/Visual Section */}
{/* Decorative Gradients & Shapes */}
HealthAxis
{/* Abstract 3D Medical Scene Placeholder */}
{/* Floating Elements */}

Empower Your
Healthcare.

Configure your facility details on the Restorative Ledger and step into a new era of management.

HIPAA Compliant & Secure

HealthAxis

Create Hospital Account

Register your medical facility into the HealthAxis network down below.

Administrator Details
